public_reproducible_evidence_mode_requir: packet evidence_source_mode may be public_reproducible only when a public_reproducible_evidence_sources_v1 manifest is included
public sources must be HTTPS URLs with explicit license, version_or_snapshot, retrieved_at, content_sha256, archive_sha256, and derived_artifact_sha256s
public source flags must be publicly_accessible=true, permission_allows_research_evaluation=true, non_synthetic=true, and raw_private_payload=false
public manifest covered_artifact_sha256s must be derived from the listed public sources and cover every expected candidate/canonical artifact hash

public examples do not bypass response preflight, candidate intake, validate-only assembly, governance approval, approved promotion, broad validators, or four-specialist LLM subagent adjudication where required
verification_after_any_real_packet_updat: python3 -m unittest test_external_baseline_coverage_matrix.py test_external_literature_baseline_protocol_recovery.py test_fair_external_baseline_run_validator.py test_human_annotation_adjudication_validator.py test_enterprise_multimodal_validation_validator.py test_production_adapter_path_validator.py test_ontology_and_user_fusion_recovery.py test_annotation_protocol_recovery.py test_multimodal_enterprise_recovery.py test_production_adapter_recovery.py test_recovered_total_acceptance.py

docker run --rm -v ${PWD}:/workspace -w /workspace/.formowl/kg-eval formowl-dev:local python -m unittest test_external_baseline_coverage_matrix.py test_external_literature_baseline_protocol_recovery.py test_fair_external_baseline_run_validator.py test_human_annotation_adjudication_validator.py test_enterprise_multimodal_validation_validator.py test_production_adapter_path_validator.py test_ontology_and_user_fusion_recovery.py test_annotation_protocol_recovery.py test_multimodal_enterprise_recovery.py test_production_adapter_recovery.py test_recovered_total_acceptance.py
